auto-fixable.summary: 21 trivy SCA findings (16 auto-fixable + 5 informational pygments) patched via uv lock --upgrade-package across 7 lockfiles plus npm install ws@^8.20.1

informational.summary: Low-severity pygments DoS CVE bundled into the dep-bump sweep above

agent-fixable.summary: 1 real semgrep fix (security workflow github-context env hoist), 4 false-positive Popen Py3.6 compat suppressions, 9 by-design suppressions (3 importlib + 5 dynamic urllib + 1 subprocess shell=True) each with inline justification

needs-review.summary: 4 prompt-injection PY_DYNAMIC_IMPORT findings refactored from inline __import__ calls to normal `import` statements (the shipwright prompt scanner has no inline suppression syntax for Python files)

verification.rescan_note: Local OSS scanners (semgrep/trivy/gitleaks) are not installed on the host; rescan will run automatically in CI on the next push to security/oss-sweep-2026-05-22 (or on PR merge to main).
